name: Fairways Golf Simulators
about: Fairways Golf Simulators is a two-bay indoor golf facility utilizing Trackman technology for simulation. The venue operates on a pay-per-bay-hour model with rates averaging $40/hour for non-members and $30/hour for members. It is designed to accommodate golfers of all skill levels, offering a convenient option for year-round practice and play. Located adjacent to Andy's Crafthouse, the facility provides a space for individuals and groups to enjoy golf with the option for food and drink during specific hours.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman simulator technology for a realistic golf experience
Convenient 24/7 access with food and drink options from the adjacent restaurant
Ability to play on famous golf courses from around the world
Family-friendly atmosphere accommodating all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Food available during Andy's Crafthouse hours (11:30 AM–9 PM)
Drinks available during Andy's Crafthouse hours (11:30 AM–9 PM)

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, all necessary equipment, including balls and tees, is provided. You are welcome to bring your own clubs if you prefer, but rental clubs are also available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available for purchase during Andy's Crafthouse hours (11:30 AM–9 PM). Outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website, as sessions are booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is described as a place where 'we can do as a family' and accommodates golfers of all skill levels, making it suitable for children.
